Additionally, governments and pharmaceutical companies may include such clauses to ensure rapid production and delivery during emergencies, which can involve complex risk-sharing agreements. If you're concerned about the implications, it's worth investigating how similar agreements have been handled historically and whether oversight mechanisms are in place to ensure accountability.
